name: Filen WebDAV
description: Filen WebDAV exposes your Filen cloud storage as a standard WebDAV endpoint. It supports proxy mode (each client authenticates with their own Filen account) and standalone mode (a single pre-configured account). Any WebDAV-compatible client — including Finder, Windows Explorer, rclone, and Infuse — can mount the share directly.

notes.text: In proxy mode (default) each WebDAV client authenticates with their own Filen email and password. No credentials are stored on the container.
In standalone mode the Filen account credentials are written to /opt/filen-webdav/server.js (mode 600). Treat this file like a secrets file.
HTTPS is not enabled by default. Place a reverse proxy (nginx, Caddy, or NPM) in front if the server is reachable from outside your LAN.
